zh.lifeSummary: 當Rachel Covey於1687年3月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利時，她的父親Hope Covey28歲，母親Mary Unknown23歲。她於1707年1月22日與Theodosius Lamphere在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1760年5月26日在她的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rachel Covey于1687年3月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利时，她的父亲Hope Covey28岁，母亲Mary Unknown23岁。她于1707年1月22日与Theodosius Lamphere在美国罗德岛州華盛頓維斯特利结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1760年5月26日在她的家乡享年73岁，埋葬在美国罗德岛州華盛頓維斯特利。

nameMeanings.name: Covey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened form of MacCovey, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cobhthaigh (see Coffey ).

English: unexplained. Covey is used of ‘pantry’ in the early modern period and covey ‘little chap’ (a diminutive of cove, Middle English cof ‘bold, eager, courageous’; see Cove ) in the early nineteenth century, but there is no evidence to confirm either as the source for the surname.

variants.name: Coffey
meanings: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cathbhadha ‘descendant of Cathbhadh’, a byname meaning ‘battle tent’, Ó Cathbhuadhaigh ‘descendant of Cathbhuadhach’ (‘battle victorious’), or Ó Cathmhogha ‘descendant of Cathmhugh’ (‘battle slave’).
shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cobhthaigh ‘descendant of Cobhthach’, a byname meaning ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: Rachel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘ewe’ in Hebrew), borne by the beloved wife of Jacob and mother (after long barrenness) of Joseph (Genesis 28–35) and of Benjamin, at whose birth she died. In the Middle Ages and subsequently this was regarded as a characteristically Jewish name, but it is now also popular among Gentiles.

variants.name: Rachelle
meanings: Elaborated form of   Rachel  , as if from French, but actually a recent coinage in English.

historicEvents.title: Pirates Hung in Newport
historicEvents.description: On July 17, 1723, twenty-eight pirates are hung in Newport, Rhode Island.

en.lifeSummary: When Rachel Covey was born on 1 March 1687, in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, her father, Hope Covey, was 28 and her mother, Mary Unknown, was 23. She married Theodosius Lamphere on 22 January 1707, in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 26 May 1760, in her hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rachel Covey est née le 1 mars 1687, à Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Hope Covey, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary Unknown, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Theodosius Lamphere le 22 janvier 1707, à Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 mai 1760, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rachel Covey am 1. März 1687 in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hope Covey 28 und ihre Mutter Mary Unknown 23. Sie hat am 22. Januar 1707 in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten Theodosius Lamphere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Mai 1760 im Alter von 73 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rachel Covey è nata il il 1 marzo 1687 nel Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, sua padre, Hope Covey, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mary Unknown, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Theodosius Lamphere il 22 gennaio 1707, nel Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 maggio 1760, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rachel Coveyが1687年3月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドキングズウエステルリーで生まれた時，父Hope Coveyは28歳，母Mary Unknownは23歳であった。1707年1月22日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーでTheodosius Lamphereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1760年5月26日に故郷で73歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Stonington, New London, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 스토닝턴

ko.Westerly, Newport, Rhode Island Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트
ko.lifeSummary: Rachel Covey(이)가 1687년 3월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 킨그스 웨스털리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hope Covey(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Unknown(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1707년 1월 22일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리에서 Theodosius Lamphere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1760년 5월 26일 그녀의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rachel Covey nasceu em 1 de março de 1687, em Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, seu pai, Hope Covey, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Unknown, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Theodosius Lamphere em 22 de janeiro de 1707, em Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de maio de 1760, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rachel Covey родилась 1 марта 1687 г. в местности вестирли, кингс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Hope Covey было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Unknown, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Theodosius Lamphere 22 января 1707 г. в местности вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 26 мая 1760 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rachel Covey nació el 1 de marzo de 1687, en Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, su papá, Hope Covey, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mary Unknown, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Theodosius Lamphere el 22 de enero de 1707, en Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de mayo de 1760, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos.
